periods.appearanceEn: Sarah maintains her distinct facial traits with soft features, but now appears in her forties. Her dark hair shows some greys and is styled more practically. She wears a longer, flowing robe made of finer fabrics that signify her esteemed role as a mother, along with a shawl to keep warm. The setting shifts to a tent within a bustling household, filled with the sounds of family life as she embraces her identity as a matriarch.

She wears a beautifully adorned robe, signifying her honored status and wisdom, complemented by a decorative headpiece. periods.appearanceEn: A young boy around 10 years old, with cropped dark hair and a lean build. He wears a tunic made of undyed wool, with bare feet. His expression shows a mix of curiosity and confusion as he carries wood for the altar.

A middle-aged man, around 40 years old, with a fuller beard and a more defined jawline. He wears a longer robe, indicative of his status, with a sash around his waist. His hair is slightly graying, and he has a calm, contemplative expression as he meets Rebekah.

She wears a simple yet beautiful dress made of quality woven linen, adorned with subtle colors that reflect her family’s respectability, while she is actively drawing water at the well.
